creator: skreuzer@exit2shell.com
text:
On Wed, Oct 10, 2007 at 05:40:04AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/mysqltoolkit,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/117057 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/117057
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Hi.

Patch looks good. You have my permission to commit it.

Thank you
